package fixture

import "context"

// WireMutex models the DropSpawn / MonsterSpawn pattern: an if/else where both
// branches write the same wire shape (one Encode4) but with different runtime
// values. The analyzer should collapse this into a SINGLE Encode4 position,
// not two consecutive ones — task-065 item 5.
type WireMutex struct{}

func (m WireMutex) Encode(l interface{}, ctx context.Context) func(map[string]interface{}) []byte {
	w := newWriter()
	return func(opts map[string]interface{}) []byte {
		w.WriteByte(0)
		if m.isMeso() {
			w.WriteInt(100)
		} else {
			w.WriteInt(200)
		}
		w.WriteByte(1)
		return w.Bytes()
	}
}

func (m WireMutex) isMeso() bool { return true }
